summary: M1 implemented the @modelcontextprotocol/sdk scaffold correctly. However, a post-review compliance check detected an architecture drift: .gitignore was modified without contract authorization to prevent node_modules leakage. Result artifact was found to have omitted this touch. Exception granted given necessity, but marks a critical gap in physical bounds checking.
rejected_claims: Result artifact falsely claimed no deviations and omitted .gitignore from touched_files.
accepted_claims: TypeScript strict setup and ESM module declaration applied correctly.
get_iteration_state correctly acts as a read-only probe using fs/promises on the established workflow/iteration-state.json file.
The required npm install and tsc --noEmit validations ran without errors.
The unauthorized .gitignore change was practically necessary and is granted an exception.
follow_up: Update workflow/dispatch.json gate to m1_completed / m2_planning_ready
(Advisory) Note that while this temporary reviewer lane is used to unlock M1 execution for this trial round, the team-scale adoption must provision a separate real reviewer entity.
